sn.s: Lucía y yo pasamos mucho tiempo juntos.
sn.e: Lucía and I spend a lot of time together.
Every day I care for her more.

sn.s: En español, 'te quiero' es para el cariño.
sn.e: In Spanish, 'te quiero' is for affection.

sn.s: 'Te amo' es más fuerte, más profundo.
Una tarde, le tomo la mano.
sn.e: One afternoon, I take her hand.
"Lucía, I care for you a lot," I tell her.

sn.s: Ella me da un abrazo fuerte.
sn.e: She gives me a tight hug.
"I care for you too," she answers.
"You really matter to me," I add.

sn.s: Siento que el corazón me late fuerte.
sn.e: I feel my heart beating hard.
"Are you happy with me?" she asks.

sn.s: Decir 'te quiero' en otro idioma es valiente.
sn.e: Saying 'I care for you' in another language is brave.

sn.s: El amor también se aprende, palabra por palabra.
sn.e: Love is also learned, word by word.
